title: Dance Competition
prize: Trophy and cash prize for the winner
rules: Participants must perform a dance routine of their choice. The routine should be between 2 to 5 minutes long. Judges will evaluate based on creativity, technique, and stage presence.
registrationCriteria: Open to all dance styles and levels. Participants must register online before the deadline.
schedule: The competition will start at 6:00 PM and end at 9:00 PM on the day of the event. There will be a break for refreshments and networking.
description: Show off your dance moves in our annual dance competition. Open to all styles and levels.

title: Hackathon
prize: Cash prize for the winning team
rules: Participants must form teams of 2 to 4 members. Projects must be developed during the event.
registrationCriteria: Open to all skill levels. Participants must register online before the deadline.
schedule: The hackathon will start at 9:00 AM and end at 9:00 PM on the day of the event. There will be breaks for meals and networking.
description: Show off your coding skills in our annual hackathon. Open to all skill levels.
